# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Let users understand the state of each project at a glance and safely retire or remove projects they no longer want.

## Success Criteria

- Each dashboard project row shows the current status.
- The project page allows disabling a project.
- The project page allows deleting a project after explicit confirmation.
- Deleting removes the project from the dashboard.

## UX Notes

- Status should be lightweight and easy to scan.
- Delete must feel deliberate and clearly destructive.
- Disable should be distinct from delete.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Status semantics should stay simple in this slice to avoid overdesign.
